response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of progressive full-stack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack—TypeScript, Node.js, and React appear consistently across his recent roles, and his current work at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which is a meaningful differentiator for this role. His background in developer tooling, TDD advocacy (workshops, open-source test runners), and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) maps well to an internal automation context. Minor gaps exist around explicit Nest.js experience and named JS/TS testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright), and Kotlin and Python are absent from the resume.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP framework experience at re:cinq, matching the emerging-tech requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack track record across multiple production environments at scale
Strong developer-tooling and DevOps background (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD) well-aligned with the internal automation context
concerns: Nest.js never mentioned despite being the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python absent from the resume; Java is listed but with minimal recent usage
Named testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not cited—TDD philosophy is evident but JS/TS ecosystem testing experience is unconfirmed

key_factors.factor: AI agent and developer tooling experience
